path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\01. Main Theme - Banjo-Kazooie.mp3
description: This totally brings me back to childhood. Grant Kirkhope's goofy-ass music is so recognisable and I love it. This remix is super faithful and also a lot of fun.
title: Main Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\02. Spiral Mountain.mp3
description: Cool that this is the only time Sakurai commissioned a non-Japanese person to do a remix for smash! Grant remixing his own music 20 years later, it's great. That's why this music is giving the Mario Rabbids soundtrack.
title: Spiral Mountain
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\03. Mumbo's Mountain.mp3
description: This is a lot of fun!
title: Mumbo's Mountain
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\04. Treasure Trove Cove.mp3
description: Love love love this remix. The melody sounds almost hypnotic. Love the quirky chord sequence. The remix leans into the spirit of the track excellently. It almost sounds like clown music.
title: Treasure Trove Cove
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\05. Freezeezy Peak.mp3
description: Sakurai in the direct was all, this 'country-style' music needed desperate remixing, but that didn't stop him putting in some originals. This one must have been a personal favourite or something. Why not.
title: Freezeezy Peak
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\06. Gobi's Valley.mp3
description: Such a good remix! This remix takes a relatively mid desert track and turns it into a such fun time.
title: Gobi's Valley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\07. Mad Monster Mansion.mp3
description: Love how over-the-top this remix is. When it gets going you have to start shaking your shoulders. Also love the spooky alien synth in the second half. The church organ. And it still sounds so Grant Kirkhope! Great.
title: Mad Monster Mansion
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\08. Vs. Klungo.mp3
description: It's fun! But I never played Banjo Tooie so don't have the reference.
title: Vs. Klungo
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\09. Vs. Mr. Patch.mp3
description: Another original track that really does Grant Kirkhope to the max.
title: Vs. Mr. Patch
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 34 - Banjo-Kazooie (Switch, Switch 2) (gamerip) (2019)\10. Vs. Lord Woo Fak Fak.mp3
description: Another extreme boss music from Banjo Tooie. It's not as good as Mr. Patch if you ask me.
title: Vs. Lord Woo Fak Fak
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 34: Banjo-Kazooie
